sys_script_include.name: RunScriptInScope

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_bd7dfc91c3573a10ccf9f1d4e401310d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_984628_deploye_0.RunScriptInScope</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>RunScriptInScope</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[class RunScriptInScope {


    static runScript(strScope, strScript, param1, param2, param3, param4, param5, param6, param7) {

        var grSI = new GlideRecord('sys_script_include');
        grSI.addQuery('sys_scope', '=', strScope);
        grSI.setLimit(1);
        grSI.query();
        if (grSI.next()) {

            grSI.script = strScript;
            grSI.sys_scope = strScope;
            var evaluator = new GlideScopedEvaluator();
            evaluator.putVariable('result', null);
            evaluator.putVariable('param1', param1);
            evaluator.putVariable('param2', param2);
            evaluator.putVariable('param3', param3);
            evaluator.putVariable('param4', param4);
            evaluator.putVariable('param5', param5);
            evaluator.putVariable('param6', param6);
            evaluator.putVariable('param7', param7);
            evaluator.evaluateScript(grSI, 'script');
            return evaluator.getVariable('result');
        }

    }


}]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-25 08:10:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>bd7dfc91c3573a10ccf9f1d4e401310d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>11</sys_mod_count><sys_name>RunScriptInScope</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Deployer API" source="x_984628_deploye_0">59b6b9dfc3433210ccf9f1d4e4013124</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Deployer API">59b6b9dfc3433210ccf9f1d4e4013124</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_bd7dfc91c3573a10ccf9f1d4e401310d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-25 08:56:50</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
